target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible evidence shows 75-100% of the building's structural mass is collapsed or reduced to rubble; remaining elements are fragmented and non-structural; no intact load-bearing walls or roof remain.

summary: One building assessed as DESTROYED with confirmed 75-100% structural mass collapse. The scene shows the ruins of a single building, with extensive rubble and no intact load-bearing elements, indicating total functional loss.
